title: PlausiDen — about
description: An independent platform shop building software that lasts.

sections.title: An independent platform shop.
sections.lede: Built by a small team that thinks software should be auditable, accessible, and reproducible — by default, not as a checkbox.

sections.text: PlausiDen is small on purpose. The platform is opinionated because every dilution we resisted was a tradeoff we did not want to ship. We pick the harder typed seam over the convenient string-keyed escape hatch, and we let the compiler reject anything else.

We do not believe in roadmaps that promise a feature in eighteen months. We believe in shipping small, audited, reproducible changes — and in letting the audit chain speak for itself when a customer asks what changed between two builds. The chain hash is the proof; the screenshot diff is the corroboration.

sections.body: We replaced three SaaS subscriptions with a single Forge build. The audit chain ships straight to compliance and the auditor stopped asking follow-up questions.
sections.attribution: the shape of an outcome the platform is engineered to produce

items.title: Discipline first
items.body: Tests + docs + audit on every commit. Codified in scripts/discipline-check.sh --strict.

items.title: Typed contracts at every boundary
items.body: If the types compile, the system doesn't break at runtime.

items.title: Reproducible builds
items.body: Same input → same hash. Independently verifiable; not a trust-the-vendor claim.

items.title: Privacy by default
items.body: Self-host everything. No third-party fonts, no analytics, no telemetry, no CDNs.

items.title: Forge alpha
items.body: First typed CMS pipeline. 9-page SkillShots dogfood site built end-to-end.

items.title: Forge 0.18 — typed CMS GA path
items.body: 27 audit phases stable. Loom catalogue at 142 primitives. forge-auth + Crucible scaffolded.

items.title: Multi-network publish
items.body: Six DeployAdapter implementations: Tor, I2P, IPFS, Gemini, Lokinet, clearnet.

items.title: LFI integration
items.body: Critic trait + Forge-LFI downstream. Neurosymbolic substrate gates AI proposals.

items.title: Forge GA
items.body: Production-mode strict gate. Public SLA + support tiers.

sections.title: Say hello.
sections.lede: Working on something where this would help? We read every email.
